spec_match.rationale: Full matrix of all four values across standard emoji, dual-presentation glyphs, and composed ZWJ/skin-tone/flag sequences.

interactive.rationale: Value cards highlight columns and category filter buttons narrow the table, including a composed-emoji-only view.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature card now describes 32 characters across six categories including composed sequences.

edge_cases.rationale: Composed rows now include family ZWJ, skin-tone modifier, flag sequence, and another ZWJ sequence.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, matrix uses design system tokens.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP on localhost:3000 in Chrome 148 loaded /v131/css-font-variant-emoji/presentation-modes/, clicked all four value-card highlight areas, clicked each category filter, and ended on `composed emoji`. The composed filter rendered exactly four rows: family ZWJ, thumbs-up skin tone, UN flag, and person-technologist ZWJ; first-row cells computed to `normal`, `text`, `emoji`, and `unicode`. Console had no messages, network requests were 200/204, and the feature conformance route reported 5 pass / 0 fail.
